item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Scheduler Jobcollections

request.description: Gets all job collections under specified subscription.

response.name: The job collections have been successfully returned.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Scheduler Jobcollections Jobcollectionname Enable

request.description: Enables all of the jobs in the job collection.

response.name: All of the jobs in the job collection have been successfully enabled.
Accepted and the enable job collection operation will complete asynchronously.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Scheduler Jobcollections Jobcollectionname Disable

request.description: Disables all of the jobs in the job collection.

response.name: All of the jobs in the job collection have been successfully disabled.
Accepted and the disable job collection operation will complete asynchronously.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Scheduler Jobcollections Jobcollectionname Jobs Jobname Run

response.name: The job has been successfully run.

query.description: the number of job history to request, in the of range of [1..100].
